rows.label: qev018901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Sigh... I'm happy, but I feel hazy... I
wonder what's wrong with Mee-mee, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0002
rows.name:
...Hey, Gold member... I have something
to consult with you about, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Do you, Gold member, have something
more important than money, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_JNK0010
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018901_SEL0011
rows.name:
Say there are many things
more important than money.

rows.label: qev018901_JNK0020
rows.name: Negative

rows.label: qev018901_SEL0021
rows.name:
State firmly that there is nothing more
important than money in this world.

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Comrades? Dreams? The future
of humanity? You like things
that are kind of vague, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0005
rows.name:
When you have things like that, do you
stop caring about money at all, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0006
rows.name:
Mee-mee found something very precious... Ever since
encountering that circular food called "pizza",
Mee-mee doesn't care about money anymore, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0007
rows.name:
I see... Since they don't give points
to Mee-mee's Super Alchemy Mech in an
easy-to-understand way like money...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0008
rows.name:
But recently, ever since encountering
that great... circular food called
"pizza", I've lost interest in money, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0009
rows.name:
Just one bite wraps me in
more happiness than earning
hundreds of millions! Pizza![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Even though if I have enough
money to buy pizza, I can be
happy for the rest of my life...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0011
rows.name:
To keep working busily without
even having time to eat pizza
feels very foolish, mo...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_JNK0030
rows.name: Proposal

rows.label: qev018901_SEL0031
rows.name:
Suggest that she take
a break for a while.

rows.label: qev018901_JNK0040
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev018901_SEL0041
rows.name:
Get angry and tell her to think
of the people who need Mee-mee.

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Somehow, I feel like I've been waiting
for you to say that for a long time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thank you, Gold member. Mee-mee
has made up her mind, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0014
rows.name:
That's right... I'm making so much
money because there are people who
need Mee-mee's Super Alchemy Mech...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Thank you, Gold member. Mee-mee
forgot something important, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'll automate the Super Alchemy Mechs,
modifying them perfectly so it's okay
even if Mee-mee retires, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0017
rows.name:
And then... I'll live here eating
pizza forever! That way I can
be happy all day long, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0018
rows.name:
Hey hey, to do that I need 50
pieces of Aurora Stone and...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0019
rows.name:
Also 20 pieces of Arc Sand Ore!
Could you get them for me, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0020
rows.name:
If you do, I'll make you a Platinum
member... a special member among special
members with a special exchange rate![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0021
rows.name:
How about it? Please! Take
Mee-mee to pizza heaven, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0022
rows.name:
Mee-mee will be waiting here
eating pizza, so be absolutely
sure to bring them, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0023
rows.name:
I'll do my last big job with them!
Please, I'm begging you, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0024
rows.name:
Wow! Delicious! Pizza truly
is a miracle, isn't it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0025
rows.name:
I couldn't taste this kind of
happiness even when I earned
hundreds of millions of G, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0026
rows.name:
I was just eating pizza the
whole time, mo! Hurry up and
bring what I asked for, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0027
rows.name:
Wa-wa-wa...! Wow!! This is...
ultimately delicious, isn't it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Hey, hey, have you eaten it before,
mo? My pizza-friend Fefen told me
about it. This "Grenade Pizza"...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0029
rows.name:
It's so delicious, so delicious...
My happiness feels like it's
going to explode, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirmative

rows.label: qev018901_SEL0051
rows.name:
Agree with Mee-mee that happiness
feels like it's going to explode.

rows.label: qev018901_JNK0060
rows.name: Proposal

rows.label: qev018901_SEL0061
rows.name:
Inform her that you have
obtained the requested items.

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0030
rows.name:
You were a pizza-friend too, mo! Nothing
makes me happier than this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Oh, right! I have to hurry
and automate the Alchemy Mechs![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0032
rows.name:
Then I can eat pizza without
worrying about time, and have
pizza talk with you too, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0033
rows.name:
Hey, did you get the things I
asked for? I have to finish up
the troublesome stuff quickly![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0034
rows.name:
Oh no, oh no! I completely
forgot about it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0035
rows.name:
I have to quickly modify the
Alchemy Mechs and enjoy pizza
time without any reservations, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0036
rows.name: So, did you get the things I asked for?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0037
rows.name:
Thank you! I'll finish the modifications
right away with this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0038
rows.name:
If I do that, the Shining
Erudition Hall will be fine
even after Mee-mee is gone, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0039
rows.name:
Yeah... Thank you truly for everything
up until now! I appoint you as
Platinum Member Number One, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0040
rows.name:
Please continue to favor the
Shining Erudition Hall's Miranium
exchange service from now on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0041
rows.name:
...Hehe, though I think Mee-mee
will only be doing reception
for you from now on, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0042
rows.name:
Come to think of it, I left a little
bit for myself and donated the rest
of my fortune to BLADE Headquarters.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0043
rows.name:
Do your best on that end too and
protect this city to the end, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0044
rows.name: ...Eh? Why did I donate it, you ask?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0045
rows.name:
Because to keep eating pizza,
I need this NLA, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0046
rows.name:
Then giving money to you guys
who protect NLA is the most
rational way to use it, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev018901_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'm counting on you, mo! Make
sure Mee-mee can continue to
eat pizza in peace, mo![ST:wait ]
